mapper.select: SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO , P.PRODUCT_NAME , I.AMOUNT , P.PRICE , I.IMAGE , P.STATUS FROM PRODUCT P JOIN INVENTORY I ON P.PRODUCT_NO = I.PRODUCT_NO WHERE P.PRICE < 0 AND P.STATUS='Y' ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_NO OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT PRODUCT_NO , PRODUCT_NAME , PRICE , USER_ID , STATUS FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
SELECT PRODUCT_NO , AMOUNT , IMAGE FROM INVENTORY WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE INVENTORY SET AMOUNT = AMOUNT - 1 WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CHANGE) FROM HISTORY_MILEAGE WHERE USER_ID = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HISTORY_MILEAGE WHERE USER_ID = #{username}

SELECT H.CHANGE , P.PRODUCT_NAME , H.CREATE_DATE FROM HISTORY_MILEAGE H JOIN PRODUCT P ON H.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO WHERE H.USER_ID = #{user.username} AND H.CHANGE < 0 ORDER BY H.CREATE_DATE OFFSET #{pageInfo.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageInfo.size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO , P.PRODUCT_NAME , I.AMOUNT , P.PRICE , I.IMAGE , P.STATUS FROM PRODUCT P JOIN INVENTORY I ON P.PRODUCT_NO = I.PRODUCT_NO WHERE P.PRICE < 0 ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_NO OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) AS PURCHASE_COUNT , P.PRODUCT_NAME FROM HISTORY_MILEAGE H JOIN PRODUCT P ON H.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO GROUP BY H.PRODUCT_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME ORDER BY PURCHASE_COUNT DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN') AS DAY, COUNT(*) AS PURCHASE_COUNT FROM HISTORY_MILEAGE GROUP BY TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'D'), TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN') ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'D'))
